name: KeyboardButtonRequestUsers
description: This object defines the criteria used to request suitable users. Information about the selected users will be shared with the bot when the corresponding button is pressed. More about requesting users »

fields.name: request_id
fields.description: Signed 32-bit identifier of the request that will be received back in the UsersShared object. Must be unique within the message.

fields.name: user_is_bot
fields.description: Pass True to request bots, pass False to request regular users. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

fields.name: user_is_premium
fields.description: Pass True to request premium users, pass False to request non-premium users. If not specified, no additional restrictions are applied.

fields.name: max_quantity
fields.description: The maximum number of users to be selected; 1-10. Defaults to 1.

fields.name: request_name
fields.description: Pass True to request the users' first and last names

fields.name: request_username
fields.description: Pass True to request the users' usernames

fields.name: request_photo
fields.description: Pass True to request the users' photos
